_comment: Orchestrator (PRG-06 Identity Cutover + Bug Lane) watcher set. Durable record of EXPECTED monitors; reconcile vs live /tasks at session-start/post-compact/post-resume per clacks/monitor-hygiene.md. Background tasks are job-scoped (job cd122717) and survive context compaction. Verify by direct-read at decision boundaries.

monitors.command: rewrite-robust: poll tail -1 every 20s, emit only when last-line .id changes (replaces tail -F re-dump)

monitors.purpose: catch reviewer Stage transitions / bounces. LABELS UNRELIABLE — always direct-query verify the WI before acting. Healthy (fired WI-1103=Executing cleanly).
